Package org.solenopsis.soap.tooling

Class ApexTestResult

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.SObject
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.ApexTestResult
public class ApexTestResult extends SObject

Java class for ApexTestResult complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="ApexTestResult">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{urn:sobject.tooling.soap.sforce.com}sObject">
       <sequence>
         <element name="ApexClass" type="{urn:sobject.tooling.soap.sforce.com}ApexClass" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ApexClassId" type="{urn:tooling.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ApexLog" type="{urn:sobject.tooling.soap.sforce.com}ApexLog" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ApexLogId" type="{urn:tooling.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ApexTestResults" type="{urn:tooling.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ApexTestRunResult" type="{urn:sobject.tooling.soap.sforce.com}ApexTestRunResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ApexTestRunResultId" type="{urn:tooling.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="AsyncApexJob" type="{urn:sobject.tooling.soap.sforce.com}AsyncApexJob" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="AsyncApexJobId" type="{urn:tooling.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Message" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="MethodName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Outcome" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="QueueItem" type="{urn:sobject.tooling.soap.sforce.com}ApexTestQueueItem" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="QueueItemId" type="{urn:tooling.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="RunTime" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="StackTrace" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="SystemModstamp" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="TestTimestamp" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
